recapPrompt.prompt: What is one of the strongest signs that sorting first might help a problem?

choices.label: The problem becomes clearer once values are in order
choices.feedback: Correct. Sorting often helps when order makes comparison or merging easier.

choices.label: The array contains only one item
choices.feedback: Not this one. A one-item array does not need sorting help.

reflectionPrompt.prompt: Explain how sorting can make a later search or comparison easier.
